svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 23px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #E2E4E6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 30px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#E2E4E6, #282a2c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(17, 20, 22), rgb(218, 221, 223)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(128, 213, 203), rgb(13, 86, 77));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 410px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #E2E4E6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#E2E4E6, #282a2c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(36, 43, 44), rgb(196, 202, 203)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(244, 201, 93), rgb(99, 62, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 183px; height: 1px; padding-top: 411px; margin-left: 272px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#E2E4E6, #282a2c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 33, 34), rgb(205, 211, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(128, 213, 203), rgb(13, 86, 77));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 240px;
